summary: Comprehensive testing of new Facette E-Commerce features: Variant Management, Similar/Combo Products, Cargo Integration, Ship Order. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All tested features working correctly.

issues: Some products have no images (showing empty grid) - this is a data issue, not a code issue

critical_code_review_comments: Products.jsx TabsList has 6 tabs but grid-cols-5 - should be grid-cols-6 for proper alignment (line 403)
Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in Login component - minor React state management issue
seed_data_creation: Variant added to product via API test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Product detail page shows images in 2-column grid (no slider arrows), 2) 'Benzer Ürünler' and 'Bu Ürünle Giyin' sections visible on product pages, 3) Admin Products page has Varyantlar tab with form for adding size/color/barcode/stock variants, 4) Admin Orders page shows cargo info with tracking numbers, 5) All cargo/ship APIs working (MNG, DHL, Yurtiçi, Aras, PTT).

features_tested.product_detail_2_column_grid: PASS - Images displayed in 2-column grid, no slider arrows
features_tested.similar_products_section: PASS - 'Benzer Ürünler' section visible with related products
features_tested.admin_variants_tab: PASS - Varyantlar tab opens with form fields (Beden, Renk, Barkod, Stok, Fiyat Farkı)
features_tested.admin_variant_form: PASS - Add variant form with size dropdown, color input, barcode, stock, price adjustment
features_tested.admin_orders_cargo_info: PASS - Orders show cargo company and tracking number
features_tested.api_cargo_companies: PASS - Returns MNG, DHL, Yurtiçi, Aras, PTT with tracking URLs
features_tested.api_similar_products: PASS - Returns similar products by category
features_tested.api_ship_order: PASS - Ships order with cargo company and tracking number
features_tested.api_order_tracking: PASS - Returns tracking info for orders

mocked_apis.iyzico_payment: MOCKED - Iyzico payment integration is sandbox mode only (no real payments)
